plain_english_summary: Deterministic financial time-series compression, replay, and query surface for bounded market-data workflows.
commercial_wedge: Search financial patterns on compressed delayed-feed archives with deterministic replay and bounded price-field fidelity. Real-market minute-bar and tick figures are bounded proxy artifacts; the open-access enterprise benchmark remains blocked on missing inputs.
technical_wedge: Deterministic financial codec with native search and replay. The carried Wave-1 bundle proves OHLCV/tick compression and price-field fidelity on a controlled corpus; volume is log-quantized and Phase 06 remains blocked on missing inputs.
ideal_first_buyer: Market-data infrastructure team or quant research platform
deployment_model: SDK — Python package with optional Rust native helper
family_position: Secondary product candidate in the Zer0pa deterministic encoding family. Not the lead commercial front door.
